title: Final Fantasy 6 - Battle with The King
description:
The FF6 party has finally made it to The King himself! But it appears that his majesty has already become God.
Will they manage to defeat the omnipotent one?

Download it here:
http://www.mediafire.com/?noz6wgxtm2k

Also featuring a new remix - Dancing Mad With The King.
MP3 - http://www.mediafire.com/?iyjzdm23ndy
